query:
UPDATE products p 
JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id 
JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id 
SET p.availableAtPalladium = FALSE 
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Rice%' OR c.name LIKE '%Noodle%' OR c.name LIKE '%Bread%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute UPDATE products p 
JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id 
JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id 
SET p.availableAtPalladium = FALSE 
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Rice%' OR c.name LIKE '%Noodle%' OR c.name LIKE '%Bread%';
